reasoning: Her FIDE ranking as of Nov 1, 2025 is 9, which will be the exact same ranking on the Wikipedia page on Nov 9, 2025 (the cutoff). Because FIDE rankings update only once a month, the ranking on Nov 16 will be identical (unless Wikipedia is severely vandalized or there is an unscheduled mid-month update, both of which are exceedingly rare). The Dec 9 rankings will be the December 1st list; considering no major known classical tournaments involving Lagno, Assaubayeva or Divya in November, her rank has a high likelihood of remaining 9 (or improving). For Feb 2026, uncertainties mount regarding new classical events like the Tata Steel or early 2026 tournaments, making it closer to a toss-up whether she will maintain her place against rising players like Assaubayeva.
